description_long: This object is a modern digital bathroom scale with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The surface is predominantly black with two stylized gray footprints indicating where to stand, providing a visual guide for users. A prominent blue digital display is located near one edge, likely used to show weight measurements. The scale appears to be made of a hard plastic or tempered glass top, with a sturdy base to support a person's weight. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for use in home bathrooms, gyms, or health clinics. There are no visible buttons, suggesting touch-sensitive controls or automatic activation when stepped on.
description: A sleek black digital bathroom scale with gray footprint guides and a blue digital display. The design is minimalistic and modern, suitable for home or gym use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both gray footprint guides and the blue digital display at the back edge.
description_view_1: Side view with the blue digital display on the right and the footprints visible on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with the blue digital display in the foreground and both footprints clearly visible.
description_view_3: Side view with the blue digital display on the left and the footprints on the right.
